---
title: "Katherine Louisa Dundas"
---

## Katherine Louisa Dundas

**Dates:** (b.1849)

### Description

niece of Anne Mackenzie

### Biography

She was working as a Sister of Mercy at Cowley in the 1881 census.

### Letters

- Letter from Oct 11th [1869 [[footnote:2]]]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
